Executive Leadership

The People Behind Czar Consultancy

Experienced consultants and legal advisors bringing deep expertise, practical knowledge and unwavering commitment to client success across Indian industries.

Leadership Team

PK
POSH Trainer & HR Compliance Expert

Pooja Kaushik

Pooja leads our corporate compliance training division, specializing in the Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Act. With extensive experience in organizational structuring, she helps enterprises design robust Internal Committees, conduct sensitization workshops, and build secure, compliant workplace environments.

POSH AuditsCorporate TrainingIC StructuringPolicy Drafting
Contact Pooja
BS
Senior Labour Law Specialist

Adv. B.M. Saini

Adv. B.M. Saini brings decades of distinguished courtroom and advisory experience. A highly respected voice in Indian labour relations, he specializes in complex statutory frameworks, representing management in critical industrial disputes, and negotiating with labour unions.

Industrial DisputesTribunal RepresentationUnion NegotiationsManagement Advisory
Contact Adv. Saini
DS
Compliance Head & Legal Strategist

Adv. Dishant Saini

As Head of Compliance, Dishant oversees firm-wide statutory operations. His sharp legal acumen ensures flawless execution of statutory registrations, complex audits, and multi-state compliance scaling.

Pan-India ComplianceStatutory AuditsContract Labour LawFactories Act
Contact Dishant
KS
Senior Payroll & Taxation Specialist

KP Sharma

KP Sharma is the architect behind our flawless payroll processing operations. With profound expertise in financial compliance, he manages end-to-end payroll administration, ensuring 100% accuracy in salary computations and timely EPF/ESIC remittances.

Payroll ComputationEPF & ESIC FilingsTax StructuringFull & Final Settlements
Contact KP Sharma

India's leading specialized labour law and compliance advisory firm, serving over 200 enterprises across sectors.
